title: Welcome to Wongo's
description:
"Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices." says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.

"Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's," they continue, without even looking up.
conditions: All players must have at least 100 Gold
notes: This event is part of the [gold]Wongo Points[/gold] system, a meta-progression mechanic that tracks cumulative purchases across runs. Each purchase grants Wongo Points: Bargain Bin grants 32 points, Featured Item grants 16 points, and Mystery Box grants 8 points. When you accumulate 2000 Wongo Points, you receive a [gold]Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge[/gold] (a cosmetic reward). The leave option triggers a [jitter][red]heated[/red][/jitter] debate with the clerk, leaving you [sine][purple]mentally drained[/purple][/sine], and downgrades a random upgraded card from your deck.
